category_sources: Official README says FIZSH is the Friendly Interactive ZSHell and a front end to ZSH.
source_facts.description says fizsh is a fish-like front end for ZSH.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title is zsh-users/fizsh.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides installation and usage documentation.
repo_sources: Official README includes git clone instructions for https://github.com/zsh-users/fizsh.git.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official README mentions syntax highlighting, Matlab-like history search, and prompt behavior.
source_facts.description says fish-like front end for ZSH.
